svg.title: PIEM emission formula decomposition
svg.desc: Top node shows the PIEM emission formula, fanning out to six correction factor nodes in a 2-column grid, all converging into a 15 physics-informed ML features node at the bottom.
svg.text: E(r,m) = d · w · EF_m(WTW) × f₁ × f₂ × f₃ × f₄ × f₅ × f₆
